project_name: PCB Designer for IoT Sensor Board
job_title: PCB Designer for IoT Sensor Board
platform: nRF52840 and LoRa low-power PCB design
project_domain: mixed-signal PCB layout, ultra-low power systems, and JLCPCB manufacturing readiness
key_features: 4-layer circular PCB layout, nRF52840 + LoRa integration, ultra-low power routing, mixed-signal checks, DFM/DFT review, JLCPCB-ready deliverables
milestone_1_desc: Schematic, stack-up, and power budget review
milestone_2_desc: PCB floorplan, RF keepout, and mixed-signal layout plan
milestone_3_desc: Layout refinement, DFM checks, and BOM/package validation
milestone_4_desc: Final review notes, fab package, and JLCPCB readiness
